rationale: In the citing paper, Lim (2010) appears only once in a grouped literature-review sentence alongside Kalra and Shi (2001), where it is used to classify prior work on prize-winner design in individual contests with homogeneous contestants. The citation is not used in the model derivations, propositions, experimental design, or interpretation of results. The paper does not engage Lim (2010)'s social loss-aversion mechanism or extend its specific framework. This is best treated as background positioning rather than a substantive citation link.
